name: FIRST OTTAWA BANCSHARES, INC.

(the Company) is a bank holding company for its wholly-owned subsidiary, The First National Bank of Ottawa (the Bank), and the Banks wholly owned subsidiary, First Ottawa Financial Corporation.The Company was organized as a Delaware corporation in 1999.As of December 31, 2011, the Company had total assets of $270.7 million, total deposits of $242.3 million, net loans, including loans held for sale, of $126.9 million and total shareh...
